question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/Downloader.java -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: partialCollection()] Can an unprivileged external user cause an `IndexOutOfBoundsException` in `partialCollection()` by manipulating the node stake data so that `nodes.getFirst().getTotalStake()` returns zero, causing `neededStake` to be zero and the `while (aggregateStake < neededStake)` loop to never execute, resulting in `nodes.subList(0, 0)` returning an empty list and causing `downloadAndParseSigFiles()` to return an empty signature map?
